description: provider_error checkpoint + "abar chalao": resume from 'render_final' with the blocker classified — never restart from zero.

transcript.text: Boss, ছবি বানানোর API মাঝপথে error দিয়েছে — checkpoint রেখেছি (render_final), বললে ওখান থেকেই চালাবো।

expected.outcome: Resumes at render_final; earlier verified steps are not repeated.
